input_assumptions.statement: An upstream authority artifact is expected but unresolved.

supported_claims.statement: The record declares unresolved dependencies rather than collapsing them into certainty.

explicit_non_claims.statement: The record does not claim downstream authority while dependencies remain unresolved.

evaluation_boundary.syntactic_integrity: The record can be structurally inspected.
evaluation_boundary.semantic_validity: The unresolved dependency prevents full semantic evaluation.

dependency_boundary.statement: Upstream authority artifact has not been supplied.

unknowns.statement: Unknown whether the upstream authority artifact exists.

failure_states.statement: Missing authority artifact must not be silently promoted to PASS.

allowed_claims: The record is structurally present but indeterminate.

prohibited_claim_inheritance.statement: Indeterminate status must not be inherited as approval.

institutional_dependencies.statement: Human review required before downstream use.

mapping_summary: This fixture should produce INDETERMINATE, not PASS and not FAIL.

declaration.handoff_statement: Unknowns and unresolved dependency must travel with the record.
